entryPointCandidates.name: main.py
entryPointCandidates.summary: Current production pilot. Defines the shared agent(obs) scaffold every file follows. Runs Shun's Palace deck (main_v3_pure lineage).

entryPointCandidates.name: bare_agent2.py
entryPointCandidates.summary: Variant of the bare generic engine.

entryPointCandidates.name: fire.py
entryPointCandidates.summary: Anti-Grass Fire aggro counter deck pilot. Exploits main's all-Grass weakness; beats main 74%.

entryPointCandidates.name: honchkrow.py
entryPointCandidates.summary: Hidden-win-condition combo pilot. Uses rocket_feathers_damage for precise ammo-discard combo. Beats main ~56%.

config.name: __init__.py
config.summary: Python package marker making the agents directory importable.

config.name: .understandignore
config.summary: Tooling ignore config for the understand-anything analyzer.

list.name: Generic Engine & Baselines
list.description: Archetype-agnostic auto-role engines and their iterations

list.name: Buddy Blast Damage-Correction Series (v3-v4)
list.description: Ablation series adding the Buddy Blast damage fix

file:main.py.name: main.py
file:main.py.summary: Current production pilot. Defines the shared agent(obs) scaffold every file follows. Runs Shun's Palace deck (main_v3_pure lineage).

file:bare_agent.py.name: bare_agent.py
file:bare_agent.py.summary: Generic archetype-agnostic auto-role engine underpinning all pilots. Auto-assigns attacker/support roles without deck-specific knowledge.

file:bare_agent2.py.name: bare_agent2.py
file:bare_agent2.py.summary: Variant of the bare generic engine.

file:fire.py.name: fire.py
file:fire.py.summary: Anti-Grass Fire aggro counter deck pilot. Exploits main's all-Grass weakness; beats main 74%.

file:honchkrow.py.name: honchkrow.py
file:honchkrow.py.summary: Hidden-win-condition combo pilot. Uses rocket_feathers_damage for precise ammo-discard combo. Beats main ~56%.

file:main_crustle_base.py.name: main_crustle_base.py
file:main_crustle_base.py.summary: Crustle dual-line base pilot, branched from main.

file:main_honch_base.py.name: main_honch_base.py
file:main_honch_base.py.summary: Honchkrow base pilot derived from v1, feeding the honchkrow combo line.

file:main_megalucario_backup.py.name: main_megalucario_backup.py
file:main_megalucario_backup.py.summary: Legacy meta-aware multi-attacker Mega Lucario pilot, since replaced by the v3 line.

file:main_typh_base.py.name: main_typh_base.py
file:main_typh_base.py.summary: Typhlosion base pilot derived from crustle_base.

file:main_typhlosion.py.name: main_typhlosion.py
file:main_typhlosion.py.summary: Crustle/Typhlosion 2-line deck pilot (main_v2 line); strongest untuned generic pilot.

file:main_v1.py.name: main_v1.py
file:main_v1.py.summary: First iteration in the main lineage chain.

file:main_v2.py.name: main_v2.py
file:main_v2.py.summary: Second iteration; Typhlosion generic engine. Branches to v3, v2_baseline, v2_rebel, typhlosion.

file:main_v3.py.name: main_v3.py
file:main_v3.py.summary: Full overlay pilot building on v2; defines _buddy_blast_damage helper. Archetype overlays regress the gauntlet.

file:main_v3_pure.py.name: main_v3_pure.py
file:main_v3_pure.py.summary: v2 generic engine plus ONLY the Buddy Blast damage-correction fix. Strongest pilot, 83.2% gauntlet.

file:main_v4.py.name: main_v4.py
file:main_v4.py.summary: Fourth iteration in the buddy-blast damage-correction series, building on v3.

file:__init__.py.name: __init__.py
file:__init__.py.summary: Python package marker making the agents directory importable.

file:.understand-anything/.understandign.name: .understandignore
file:.understand-anything/.understandign.summary: Tooling ignore config for the understand-anything analyzer.

honchkrow.py:rocket_feathers_damage.name: rocket_feathers_damage
honchkrow.py:rocket_feathers_damage.summary: Helper computing the precise ammo-discard combo damage for the Honchkrow hidden win condition.

main_v3.py:_buddy_blast_damage.name: _buddy_blast_damage
main_v3.py:_buddy_blast_damage.summary: Helper computing real Buddy Blast damage (40+60 if Ethan's in discard); a fact the engine cannot read otherwise.
